modell.maalfunksjon: min sum_i [ K_i D_i / Q_i + h_i c_i (Q_i/2 + k_i sigma_{DL,i}) + pi_i D_i sigma_{DL,i} L(k_i) / Q_i ]
modell.lagrange: L = TC(Q,k) + lambda_V (sum v_i (Q_i/2 + k_i sigma_{DL,i}) - V_max) + lambda_B (sum c_i (Q_i/2 + k_i sigma_{DL,i}) - B_max)

KKT.dL_dQi=0: - K_i D_i / Q_i^2 + h_i c_i / 2 + lambda_V v_i/2 + lambda_B c_i/2 - pi_i D_i sigma_{DL,i} L(k_i) / Q_i^2 = 0
KKT.dL_dki=0: h_i c_i sigma_{DL,i} - pi_i D_i sigma_{DL,i} (1 - Phi(k_i)) / Q_i + (lambda_V v_i + lambda_B c_i) sigma_{DL,i} = 0
KKT.komplementaritet: lambda_V, lambda_B >= 0, skranker binder naar lambda > 0
